meaning: n.[电信]可变方向图的多元菱形天线(亦作MUSA,Musa)
examples: The banana plant is a hybrid, originating from the mismatched pairing of Musa acuminata and Musa balbisiana.
There had been a break in the Musa case.
Musa concealed his dirty business practices.
Musa doesn't believe treatment of albinos will improve if Tanzanians remain uneducated about albinism.
Ms Musa had a bruised left cheek, a grazed knee and a sore neck.
